errors.required: Please enter a name for your secret key.

manage.not-allowed: You're not allowed to manage API keys

onboarding-configs.title: Onboarding configurations
onboarding-configs.subtitle: Set up requirements for customers onboarding onto your platform.
onboarding-configs.cta-not-allowed: You're not allowed to create onboarding configurations

table.empty-state: You haven't created any vault onboarding configurations just yet.

actions.not-allowed: You're not allowed to manage onboarding configs

confirmation.title: Disable onboarding config?
confirmation.description: Are you sure you want to disable this onboarding configuration?

errors.required: Please enter a name for the onboarding configuration.

type-form.title: Types of onboarding configuration
type-form.description: Select the type of verification flow you want to create:

kyc.title: KYC
kyc.description: Know Your Customer (KYC) is the obligation of banks, businesses, and other financial institutions to identify and authenticate a person's identity before doing business with them.

kyb.title: KYB
kyb.description: Know Your Business (KYB) is the obligation to verify the identity of any entity that you do business with.

errors.required: Please enter a name for your onboarding configuration.

kyc-collect-form.title: KYC
kyc-collect-form.description: You can customize the verification flow by choosing optional fields to collect.

add-ons.title: Add-ons
add-ons.document-description: We might still need to ask some users to capture their ID Document as part of our step-up verification flow. For the full list of countries and document types we support, please go here.

investor-profile.label: Broker questions (Investor profile)
investor-profile.description: Required for all brokerage and investment apps.

questions.employment: What's your employment status and occupation?
questions.brokerage-employment: Are you employed by a brokerage firm?
questions.risk-tolerance: How would you describe your risk tolerance?
questions.declarations: Do any of the following apply to you or a member of your immediate family?

kyc-access-form.title: Authorized scopes
kyc-access-form.description: Select the data attributes you need read access to after a user onboarding. During onboarding, the user will "authorize" access to the scopes you choose below. If you are not sure what you will need, leave all the default fields selected.

kyb-collect-form.title: KYB
kyb-collect-form.description: You can customize the verification flow by choosing optional fields to collect.
kyb-collect-form.beneficial-owner-warning: Only a beneficial owner can verify a business. A beneficial owner is anyone who owns at least 25% of the business.

kyb-bo-collect-form.title: KYC of a Beneficial owner
kyb-bo-collect-form.description: To successfully verify a business we also need to verify its beneficial owner's identity.

kyb-access-form.title: Authorized scopes
kyb-access-form.description: Select the data attributes you need read access to after an onboarding. During onboarding, the user will "authorize" access to the scopes you choose below. If you are not sure what you will need, leave all the default fields selected.

errors.required: Please enter a name for the onboarding configuration.
